allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Сватбена позивница - Александар и Марија

- Sage green & gold color scheme with modern elegant fonts
- Countdown timer for May 9, 2026 wedding
- Timeline with 4 events and Google Maps links
- RSVP form ready for future Excel integration
- Fully translated to Serbian Cyrillic
- Responsive design for mobile devices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update Google Maps links with correct locations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update per friend''s feedback

- Reorder: Svečana proslava \(16:00\) now before Građansko venčanje \(17:45\)
- Change fonts back to Old Standard TT + Caveat \(original style\)
- Update message field: "Порука или песма коју бисте желели да чујете на нашој прослави"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add couple photo to header section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add circular frame to header photo

- Round border with sage green + gold outline
- Matches original design style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
